description: Live exploration workspace for CCO, CPO, and CTO board meeting preparation

cells.title: Revenue Trend — Last 12 Months
cells.sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m', summary_date) AS month, SUM(gross_revenue) AS revenue, SUM(order_count) AS orders, SUM(unique_customers) AS customers FROM `vishal-sandpit-474523.gold.mart_revenue_summary` WHERE summary_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
cells.notes: Click 'Explain with Gemini' to get an AI summary of the revenue trend

cells.title: Customer Segment Health Map
cells.sql: SELECT customer_segment, churn_risk, COUNT(*) AS customers, ROUND(AVG(total_lifetime_value), 2) AS avg_ltv, ROUND(SUM(total_lifetime_value), 2) AS segment_revenue FROM `vishal-sandpit-474523.gold.dim_customers` GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY segment_revenue DESC
cells.notes: Breakdown of customers by segment and churn risk with LTV metrics

cells.title: Gemini Customer Insights Explorer
cells.sql: SELECT customer_name, customer_segment, churn_risk, total_lifetime_value, days_since_last_purchase, gemini_persona_and_strategy FROM `vishal-sandpit-474523.ai.customer_concierge` WHERE generation_status = 'success' ORDER BY total_lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 25
cells.notes: Top customers with Gemini-generated personas. Filter by segment or churn risk to focus analysis.

cells.title: Data Pipeline Health Dashboard
cells.sql: SELECT entity, status, batch_id, rows_processed, started_at, completed_at, TIMESTAMP_DIFF(completed_at, started_at, SECOND) AS duration_secs, error_message FROM `vishal-sandpit-474523.governance.batch_audit_log` ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 20
cells.notes: Real-time delta pipeline status. Red rows indicate failures requiring investigation.
